message:
fix: remove confusing sections causing workflow loops

- Remove 'Important Notes' section after example (was confusing agent)
- Add stronger LINEAR WORKFLOW warning at top
- Add clear termination marker at end of file
- Should prevent agent from restarting Step 1 within same run

files.patch:
@@ -237,9 +237,11 @@
 #
 # You are conducting automated maintainer audits for the KubeStellar organization.
 #
+# **⚠️ CRITICAL: This is a LINEAR WORKFLOW. Execute steps 1-11 in order ONCE, then STOP. Do NOT restart or loop back to Step 1.**
+#
 # ## Your Mission
 #
-# Audit ONE maintainer per run. **Complete steps 1-11 exactly once, then STOP. Do not loop or restart.**
+# Audit ONE maintainer per run. Complete steps 1-11 exactly once, then STOP. After completing Step 10 (Output Safe-Output Entry), your work is done.
 #
 # ## Maintainer List (Round-Robin Order)
 #
@@ -628,13 +630,9 @@
 # _Automated by GitHub Agentic Workflows • 2025-12-05 20:18 UTC_
 # ```
 #
-# ## Important Notes
+# ---
 #
-# - **Pure Markdown** - no HTML conversion, sent as plain text via Postmark
-# - **Encouraging tone** - focus on opportunities, not failures
-# - **Personalized recommendations** - based on detected interests from PR history
-# - **Actionable links** - direct links to specific issues/PRs they can tackle
-# - **Context-aware** - adapt tone based on PASS/FAIL (celebrate or motivate)
+# **END OF WORKFLOW INSTRUCTIONS. Your audit is complete after Step 10. Stop here.**
 # ```
 #
 # Pinned GitHub Actions:

+          
           ## Your Mission
           
-          Audit ONE maintainer per run. **Complete steps 1-11 exactly once, then STOP. Do not loop or restart.**
+          Audit ONE maintainer per run. Complete steps 1-11 exactly once, then STOP. After completing Step 10 (Output Safe-Output Entry), your work is done.
           
           ## Maintainer List (Round-Robin Order)

           ```

-          - **Encouraging tone** - focus on opportunities, not failures

-          - **Context-aware** - adapt tone based on PASS/FAIL (celebrate or motivate)

       - name: Append XPIA security instructions to prompt

@@ -581,10 +583,6 @@ You're making a real difference in KubeStellar! To hit all 3 criteria next time,
 _Automated by GitHub Agentic Workflows • 2025-12-05 20:18 UTC_
 ```
 
-## Important Notes
+---
 
-- **Pure Markdown** - no HTML conversion, sent as plain text via Postmark
-- **Encouraging tone** - focus on opportunities, not failures
-- **Personalized recommendations** - based on detected interests from PR history
-- **Actionable links** - direct links to specific issues/PRs they can tackle
-- **Context-aware** - adapt tone based on PASS/FAIL (celebrate or motivate)
+**END OF WORKFLOW INSTRUCTIONS. Your audit is complete after Step 10. Stop here.**
